name: Barbell Wrist Curl
description: Seated exercise with barbell resting on knees, curling wrists upward to target forearm flexors.

name: Reverse Barbell Wrist Curl
description: Performed with overhand grip, curling wrists downward to target forearm extensors.

name: Dumbbell Wrist Curl
description: Unilateral or bilateral wrist curl using dumbbells for balanced forearm development.

name: Reverse Dumbbell Wrist Curl
description: Dumbbell wrist curl with palms down to isolate extensor muscles of the forearm.

name: Behind-the-Back Barbell Wrist Curl
description: Standing wrist curl with barbell held behind back to emphasize forearm flexors from a stretched position.

name: Farmer’s Walk
description: Grip-intensive carry using heavy dumbbells or farmer’s handles to build forearm and grip strength.

name: Plate Pinch Carry
description: Pinching weight plates between fingers and walking to develop crushing grip and forearm endurance.

name: Towel Pull-up
description: Pull-up variation using towels draped over bar to challenge grip and forearm strength.

name: Cable Wrist Curl
description: Wrist curl using low cable pulley for constant tension and controlled movement.

name: Reverse Cable Wrist Curl
description: Cable-based reverse wrist curl for forearm extensors with smooth resistance curve.

name: Dead Hang
description: Static hold from pull-up bar to build grip endurance and forearm isometric strength.

name: Wrist Roller
description: Rolling a weighted rope up and down using a wrist roller device to build forearm stamina.

name: Zottman Curl
description: Combines supinated curl with pronated lowering to work both flexors and extensors of the forearm.

name: Fingertip Push-up
description: Advanced push-up variation balancing on fingertips to build finger, hand, and forearm strength.

name: Grip Trainer Squeeze
description: Isometric squeezing of a hand gripper to develop crushing grip and forearm definition.
